calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Petitioner: Maylor Enrique Davila, present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter: Canilo Ganzalez.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Tania Davila.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Reset To Jun-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge.
Petitioner: Maylor Enrique Davila, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The OSC for Change of Name is continued to June 14, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for the petitioner to bring a Spanish Translator.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
